result:
The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned dataset containing NSID, bmi25, and bmi32 variables has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The script performed the following steps:
1. Loaded all input files from the data/input/ directory
2. Merged the datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Harmonized missing values for BMI variables according to the specified codes
4. Selected only the required variables (NSID, bmi25, bmi32)
5. Saved the cleaned dataset to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
